title: Automotive Coatings Industry
summary: Coating systems for vehicle interiors, lamps, exterior trim, bumpers and body applications, supported by application testing and technical service.

title: Electronic Coating Industry
summary: Decorative and protective finishes for mobile devices, computers, household appliances and electronic components, including PVD, metallic, elastic and LDS systems.

title: Water Based Coating Industry
summary: Waterborne coating technology using water as the primary diluent, developed for application performance, appearance and environmental objectives.

title: Industrial Anticorrosive Coating Industry
summary: Protective coating solutions for machinery, power and petrochemical equipment, bridges, ships, containers and other demanding industrial assets.
